properties.name: sloth.mq.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable MQ starter auto configuration.

properties.name: sloth.mq.idempotent-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable consumer idempotent protection.

properties.name: sloth.mq.max-retry
properties.description: Maximum retry times for message consumption.

properties.name: sloth.mq.consume-idempotent-key-prefix
properties.description: Redis key prefix for consumer idempotence.
